prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: MCN-ZIPPER-LUBE-91120-AMZN-2PK Product Type: MACHINE_LUBRICANT Brand (from catalog): GEAR AID Existing Title: GEAR AID Zipper Lubricant Wax for Tents, Drysuits, Soft Coolers and more Description: Zip Tech is a heavy duty lubricant designed to protect watertight, airtight watersports zippers. It offers UV protection for nylon and plastic zippers, while protecting metal zippers from chlorine and salt.

Zip Tech is non-toxic and contains no silicone or paraffin. Search Terms: replacement zipper cleaner lubricant scuba gear repair Features: - Lubricate, clean, and quickly unzip zippers on outdoor gear; features a non-toxic, silicone-free formula that works in all water temperatures - Protects against rust, corrosion, chlorine and salt in all temperatures - Provides UV protection for nylon and plastic zippers - Zip Tech helps protect against exposure to harmful chlorine, salt and pollutants. Zip Tech will not flake or jam in extreme temperatures - Contains no silicone or paraffin Non-toxic, biodegradable === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: GEAR AID Zipper Lubricant Wax for Outdoor Gear

tokens.name: Zipper Lubricant Wax for Outdoor Gear

anthropic.title_differentiation: UV Protection, Non-Toxic, Silicone-Free, Rust And Corrosion Resistant, All Water Temperatures

openai.title_differentiation: Non-Toxic Silicone-Free Formula, Protects Against Rust Corrosion, UV Protection For Nylon And Plastic Zippers
